_note: GOLDEN TEST VECTOR for the EP-EXTERNAL-VERIFICATION-STATEMENT-v1 statement_digest construction. If your INDEPENDENT signer does not reproduce expected_statement_digest for the `statement` below, your digest construction diverges from the spec and your statements will NOT verify, regardless of your verifier logic. This lets you unit-test the digest in isolation, in ANY language, with no EP tooling. It is the single most common integration wall.
domain_separator_byte: 0x00 (ONE NUL byte, not the two characters backslash-zero)
critical_notes: The `statement` is canonicalized with its ENTIRE top-level `signature` member removed (not just signature_b64u or statement_digest). The vector below already has no signature member, so canonicalize it as-is.

Line endings and whitespace do NOT matter here (JCS re-serializes the parsed value), but they DO matter for the separate suite_digest, which is SHA-256 over the RAW BYTES of each conformance vector file. On Windows, set core.autocrlf=false or rely on the repo .gitattributes so those files stay LF.

limitations: Example statement for digest reproduction only; authorizes nothing.
